title: Better 3D Beds - Java Port
description: Better Beds redesigns Minecraft beds, adding new models, textures, and colors to improve their appearance and give them a more modern and updated design.
body:
![project_banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd0ec2a60983b21c0d616a7a048b5b9dddc28c1f.png)

Better Beds improves Minecraft beds by adding new models, textures, and colors, giving it a more modern and updated design while maintaining the original style of the game.

📌This pack is a Java Edition port from [Better Beds](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft-bedrock/texture-packs/better-beds-resource-pack-1)
     
![post divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d4619490a4bef504d12e036dd6c4edd75508462.png)

📕Description

This texture pack improves the 3D models of the beds by adding new details and giving them a more rustic and modern design. In addition, it also improves the colors, making them more vibrant and allowing them to stand out better in builds.

![post divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d4619490a4bef504d12e036dd6c4edd75508462.png)

![InGame1(https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/N3nAQXAg/images/101d48739c0179543c4d460fe84df320223a8ed9_350.webp)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/N3nAQXAg/images/4e5503906e139bb8a42a5bac88411a9d0d8119a5.png)

![InGame2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/N3nAQXAg/images/101d48739c0179543c4d460fe84df320223a8ed9.png)

![InGame2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/N3nAQXAg/images/b3a58ee1ba6754f6fe129f34e394ca4caaf875d3.png)

![InGame4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/N3nAQXAg/images/c23f2a260a4d156fb61b6a3774eab34d3b962ec4.png)

![post divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d4619490a4bef504d12e036dd6c4edd75508462.png)

 📝 Notes

You can't claim this pack as yours, steal the code for any other project. You can showcase this addon in any video as long as I am credited properly (common sense).

If you need help, or just want to keep up with me, here's my [Discord Server](https://discord.com/invite/2upRDWM5qB)
